experiments.notes: Auto-generated manifest for autonomous run. Spec description: All completed experiments are on split_cifar10. Testing on split_cifar100 (10x more classes) validates whether the low-tuning approach generalizes to harder domains. This directly tests the production deployment claim that hyperparameters should work across domains without expensive retuning.
